title: Crispy Argentinian Pepper Pilaf
description: A savory and peppery meal-prep dish featuring a unique blend of grape juice, bhuna spices, and dairy-free-friendly elements to create a crispy texture.

ingredients.name: Almond Meal or Quinoa Flakes (for texture)

instructions: Soak the grape juice in water for about an hour to reduce its sweetness.
In a pan, heat olive oil and add minced garlic. Sauté until fragrant.
Add Bhuna Spice blend and cumin powder, sautéing briefly before removing from heat.
Combine reduced grape juice with spices mixture and salt in a blender. Blend until smooth.
Pour the blended mixture over almond meal or quinoa flakes to coat evenly.
Spread the coated almond meal or quinoa flakes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, ensuring even coverage.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 20-25 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
